lead: This machine uses normal, suru, and reset. Set the suru count when you read the suru line.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep normal, suru, and reset on separate lines.

factTable: Fix route and suru count first.

sections.title: How to use
body: Use normal when the table should be read without suru count.
Use suru only after the current count is set.

sections.title: Memo
body: If the count is not clear, do not force the suru line.
This page keeps the current checker structure in a compact format.
